# CalendarApp Source Onboarding Docs

> Public documentation for onboarding event sources into CalendarApp. Covers schema
> submission, test-fetch validation, and contributor workflows for human contributors
> and autonomous AI agents. All pages below are raw markdown — fetch them directly
> without JavaScript.

## Core pages

- [Home / Index](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/index.md)
- [Choose A Source Type](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/choose-source-type.md)
- [Submission API And Validation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/submission-api-and-validation.md)
- [Source Schema JSON Schema Files](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/json-schema-files.md)

## Source type guides

- [ICS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/ics.md)
- [RSS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/rss.md)
- [JsonApi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/json-api.md)
- [Pipeline V3 Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/v3/pipeline-overview.md)
- [Pipeline V3 Examples](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/v3/pipeline-examples.md)
- [Pipeline V3 Migration Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/v3/migration-guide.md)
- [Pipeline V3 Type Pair Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/v3/type-pair-reference.md)
- [Pipeline V3 Event Input Constraints](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/v3/event-input-constraints.md)
- [Html Detail Enrichment Patterns](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/v3/html-detail-enrichment.md)
- [HtmlLite Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/html-lite/overview.md)
- [HtmlLite API Workflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/html-lite/api-workflow.md)
- [HtmlLite Schema Basics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/html-lite/schema-basics.md)
- [HtmlLite Selectors](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/html-lite/selectors.md)
- [HtmlLite Event Identity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/html-lite/event-identity.md)
- [HtmlLite Time Handling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/html-lite/time-handling.md)
- [HtmlLite Pagination](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/html-lite/pagination.md)
- [HtmlLite Detail Pages](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/html-lite/detail-pages.md)
- [HtmlLite Validation Checklist](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/html-lite/validation-checklist.md)
- [HtmlLite Troubleshooting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/html-lite/troubleshooting.md)

## Machine-readable schemaDefinition contracts (JSON Schema)

These files describe the allowed shape of the inner `schemaDefinition` field for each
source type. Use them to validate or generate a `schemaDefinition` before calling the API.

- [ICS schemaDefinition JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/ics.schema.json)
- [RSS schemaDefinition JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/rss.schema.json)
- [Pipeline V3 schemaDefinition JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/v3/source-schema-v3.schema.json)
- [JsonApi V2 schemaDefinition JSON Schema (legacy)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/json-api-v2.schema.json)
- [HtmlLite schemaDefinition JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/html-lite.schema.json)

## API request envelope contract (JSON Schema)

Defines the valid payload structure for both test-fetch and community-submissions endpoints.

- [Submission Request JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/source-schemas/submission-request.schema.json) — describes name, description, type, feedUrl, schemaDefinition, metadata fields

## AI agent documentation

- [Autonomous Runbook](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/ai/source-onboarding/runbook.md)
- [ChatGPT Prompt Template](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/martinisaksen/calendarapp-docs/main/docs/ai/source-onboarding/prompt-template.md)
